overview: Vellore Institute of Technology (VIT) Vellore is one of India's leading private engineering institutions, known for its strong placement record, industry-aligned curriculum, and global collaborations. It is especially recognized for its 'Dream' and 'Super Dream' placement categories attracting top multinational companies.

coursesAndFees.tuitionFee: Category-based (VITEEE rank): Group A (Civil, Mech, Bio): ₹1,76,000–₹3,98,000/year; Group B (CSE, ECE, IT): ₹1,98,000–₹4,93,000/year. Includes ₹3,000 refundable caution deposit.
Varies by specialization. Median placement ₹9.15 LPA (NIRF 2025).

placements.totalOffers: 14,044 offers by 868 companies (2025); TCS alone: 4,004 offers
placements.companiesVisited: Microsoft, Amazon, Oracle, Dell, PayPal, Cisco, Morgan Stanley, Deloitte, Intel, TCS
placements.internationalOffers: Multiple ₹1 Cr+ global packages in recent cycles

admissions.admissionProcess: Admission to B.Tech programs is based on VITEEE rank followed by counseling and category-based fee allocation.
admissions.importantDates: Follows VITEEE exam schedule and counseling timeline annually.

campus.specialNote: Hostel & mess: ₹1.2L–₹2.1L/year (AC/Non-AC). GVSDP Scholarship: Rank 1–50: 75% waiver; 51–100: 50%; 101–1000: 25%. Board toppers: 100% waiver. STARS Scheme: full support for underprivileged rural students.

contact.address: VIT University, Vellore – 632014, Tamil Nadu, India
